description: Build an interactive 'Quote Explorer' dashboard in TiddlyWiki by creating a tiddler titled exactly 'Quote Explorer'. The wiki contains pre-seeded quotes tagged Quote with author and source fields. The dashboard must feature an Analytics Section displaying dynamic statistics for 'Total Quotes' (all tiddlers tagged Quote), 'Starred Quotes' (all tiddlers tagged Starred), and 'Total Authors' (unique authors across all quotes). It must also include a Main Explorer Section listing all quotes with their text, author, and source, including an interactive checkbox for each to toggle the Starred tag. Additionally, provide a Shortlist Section with a 'Starred Quotes' heading that dynamically displays tiddlers tagged with both Quote and Starred. Use TiddlyWiki's reactive data-binding widgets to manage the collection.
